title: Evaluate vehicle body repair materials, equipment and work processes
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Evaluate vehicle body repair materials, equipment and work processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine process requirements

pcs.text: Identify requirements for body repair facility1.2 Develop framework and rating system to facilitate comparisons of materials, equipment and processes1.3 Identify and assess OEM repair requirements to establish comparisons and benchmarks to be used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify requirements for body repair facility1.2 Develop framework and rating system to facilitate comparisons of materials, equipment and processes1.3 Identify and assess OEM repair requirements to establish comparisons and benchmarks to be used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify requirements for body repair facility1.2 Develop framework and rating system to facilitate comparisons of materials, equipment and processes1.3 Identify and assess OEM repair requirements to establish comparisons and benchmarks to be used.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine process requirements

elements.title: Identify specifications for required body repair materials, equipment and work processes

pcs.text: Identify repair steps and work processes and produce flow charts2.2 Identify material and equipment specifications to match repair processes2.3 Consult staff and management to identify additional or altered requirements2.4 Identify materials, tooling and equipment requirements for body work undertaken in facility and document specifications2.5 Identify work health and safety (WHS) requirements for safe facility and work practices2.6 Compile and document required specification data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify repair steps and work processes and produce flow charts2.2 Identify material and equipment specifications to match repair processes2.3 Consult staff and management to identify additional or altered requirements2.4 Identify materials, tooling and equipment requirements for body work undertaken in facility and document specifications2.5 Identify work health and safety (WHS) requirements for safe facility and work practices2.6 Compile and document required specification data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify repair steps and work processes and produce flow charts2.2 Identify material and equipment specifications to match repair processes2.3 Consult staff and management to identify additional or altered requirements2.4 Identify materials, tooling and equipment requirements for body work undertaken in facility and document specifications2.5 Identify work health and safety (WHS) requirements for safe facility and work practices2.6 Compile and document required specification data.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify specifications for required body repair materials, equipment and work processes

elements.title: Evaluate materials, equipment and work processes against facility requirements

pcs.text: Identify and document material options against required quality, finish and conformity to OEM specifications and repair standards3.2 Identify and document equipment options3.3 Select materials and equipment based on facility work processes and comparisons of performance, cost and specifications compared to established rating system3.4 Document outcomes and prepare report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document material options against required quality, finish and conformity to OEM specifications and repair standards3.2 Identify and document equipment options3.3 Select materials and equipment based on facility work processes and comparisons of performance, cost and specifications compared to established rating system3.4 Document outcomes and prepare report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document material options against required quality, finish and conformity to OEM specifications and repair standards3.2 Identify and document equipment options3.3 Select materials and equipment based on facility work processes and comparisons of performance, cost and specifications compared to established rating system3.4 Document outcomes and prepare report.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Evaluate materials, equipment and work processes against facility requirements
